Work

Representative architecture engagements.

Selected engagements across regulated, enterprise, financial, public-sector, AI, and distributed systems contexts. Each entry reflects real architectural work; descriptions are generalized in accordance with standard professional confidentiality.

01 Government / regulated services

Public-sector digital platform

Context
A secure digital service requiring identity, audit trails, payment integration, and intergovernmental system coordination.
Architectural role
Designed the platform architecture, integration model, security controls, and documentation required to align operational, compliance, and delivery stakeholders.
Outcome
A structured architecture for a sensitive digital workflow with traceability, integration readiness, and production-oriented governance.
02 Enterprise systems

Distributed retail ERP & POS

Context
A distributed retail environment with hundreds of branches requiring reliable inventory, sales, and operational synchronization.
Architectural role
Designed distributed system patterns, event-driven synchronization, service boundaries, and operational controls for large-scale branch operations.
Outcome
Improved architectural clarity for real-time operations, system consistency, and maintainable expansion across distributed locations.
03 Fintech / blockchain

Tokenized real-estate and fintech platform

Context
A regulated investment platform involving tokenized real-world assets, investor workflows, payment integration, and compliance-sensitive transaction flows.
Architectural role
Led solution architecture across token lifecycle, smart contract design, integration boundaries, cloud infrastructure, and technical documentation.
Outcome
A documented architecture suitable for technical, legal, and stakeholder review before and during implementation.
04 AI systems

AI-assisted decision workflows

Context
A system requiring AI-assisted analysis within transactional workflows while preserving operational control, auditability, and integration with existing services.
Architectural role
Designed integration patterns for AI components, workflow boundaries, evaluation considerations, and observability requirements.
Outcome
A clearer path toward production use of AI-enabled functionality without treating the model as an uncontrolled black box.
05 Technical governance

Architecture documentation and delivery governance

Context
Teams needing credible architecture packages, implementation plans, estimates, and decision records for complex delivery environments.
Architectural role
Produced SRS, HLSD, C4 views, ADRs, project estimates, and technical documentation to support delivery and stakeholder alignment.
Outcome
Decision-grade documentation that reduced ambiguity and improved execution readiness.
Discuss a mandate
RB AYOUB Solutions Inc.

Senior architecture for complex systems.

Based in Laval, Québec.
